name_en: 🔥 Small Glossy Calfskin Panta Puzzle Bag 💥Puzzle outlines a rectangular shape with distinctive geometric lines 🎁 This small version is made of glossy calfskin, featuring denim pants style details 💋 Geometric bag 24CM Puzzle bag, original imported calfskin plain weave 🐮🐮 A best-selling geometric bag 👜 The Puzzle bag is the first handbag created by Creative Director Jonathan Anderson for L0⚡️EWE 😻 The rectangular shape and precise cutting technology create Puzzle's unique geometric lines 👛 This small size version is made of soft grain calfskin * The small Puzzle can hold, for example, a large wallet, all sizes of phones and sunglasses 🕶 Can be carried on the shoulder, crossbody, held as a clutch, or with the top handle * Removable 🎁
name_cn:

Size: 24CM~16CM~10CM
Style No.: 9109
Color: Antique Brown
